privileged_info_summary: The paste_as_new_layer task uses real images from Unsplash (mountain and forest landscapes). The primary image URL returns an 800x533 JPEG despite the w=800&q=80 parameter in the setup script. GIMP 2.10 is configured with full support for XCF format (preserves layers, transparency, and selections) and the 'Paste as New Layer' feature (accessible via Edit → Paste as → New Layer menu). The verifier uses a heuristic approach combining XCF layer count detection, pixel-level content analysis (change percentage and color intensity), and structural indicators to verify task success (requires 3 of 4 criteria met). Task timeout is 120 seconds with max 8 steps allowed.
